/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hermes-elysium.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/hermes-elysium.dir/hermes-elysium_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" -o hermes-elysium  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 -lqtermwidget6 -lQt6Widgets -lQt6Gui -lQt6Core /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
